title: Chinese Imports Seasonality Hits
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
Perhaps lost in the news flow surrounding the US presidential election, the latest instalment in the Chinese recovery narrative was released over the weekend. Data from the Chinese customs authority showed total imports continuing to rise in October, although growth rates were not reaching the same dizzy heights as in the preceding month. Unlike recent months' releases, the data set was not entirely positive.
